title: 以下、Kernel/FUGUEに活用できる？ Server: SimpleHTTP/0.6 Python/3.11.9
summary_text: Use this first-pass priority order for [skill-rationalization-inventory.csv](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/skill-rationalization-inventory.csv): 1. **Blocker gates first (must pass)** `hard_fail_flags`, `primary_scope`, `security_boundary_status`, `governance_status` If blocker exists, don’t `keep` in first pass. 2. **System value core (main score drivers)** `system_leverage_score`, `functional_overlap`, `usage_90d` These should drive most of the decision weight. 3. **Sustainability modifiers** `portability_score`, `operational_cost_score` 4. **Action routing fields** `candidate_target`, then fill `decision`, `decision_rationale`, `next_action`. Quick first-pass rubric: - `keep`: no blockers, high `system_leverage_score`, low overlap, active usage. - `merge`: no blockers, medium/high leverage, overlap is `partial/high`, clear `candidate_target`. - `replace`: capability still needed (usage/leverage not low) but portability/governance/security is weak. - `retire`: low usage + low leverage + high overlap, or unresolved blocker.
